home.audienceIntro: Every role pays a price when the system is scattered. One platform fixes that.
home.connectivityTitle: Don't lose a school day to bad connectivity
home.connectivitySubtitle: When the network drops during attendance or fee collection, you shouldn't start over. Install ShuleOS on any phone—offline-ready when it matters most.
home.connectivityFeature1: Works on any device—no special hardware required
home.connectivityFeature2: One tap on your home screen beats re-entering data when the network fails
home.connectivityFeature3: Offline-ready for attendance and cached pages

home.rolesSectionTitle: Everyone pays when the system is broken
home.rolesSectionSubtitle: Each role has a different leak. ShuleOS plugs them all—from the director's desk to the parent's phone.
home.modulesSectionSubtitle: Every module fixes a cost you're already paying—in time, money, or trust.
home.finalCtaTitleLine2: or one afternoon to go live?
home.finalCtaSubtitle: Schools across the DRC are already paying for chaos. {productName} costs less than keeping the leaks open.
home.finalCtaHighlight1: No setup fees or long-term contracts
home.finalCtaHighlight3: WhatsApp support from a real team
home.adminTitle: You shouldn't find out your cash position on Friday
home.adminDescription: When fees live in notebooks and grades in separate files, you manage blind. One dashboard shows finances, attendance, performance, and staff—before problems reach the gate.
home.adminFeature1: One source of truth for students, classes, admissions, and staff
home.adminFeature3: Branded school website with online admissions before families go elsewhere
home.teacherTitle: You became a teacher—not a data-entry clerk
home.teacherDescription: Evenings lost to attendance lists and grade re-entry add up every week. Take attendance once, enter grades once, message parents once—from one dashboard.
home.teacherFeature1: Daily attendance without rewriting the same list on paper
home.teacherFeature2: Gradebooks, exams, and report cards without the end-of-term panic
home.teacherFeature3: Reach parents directly—no more "come to the office" loops
home.parentTitle: Stop finding out about fees and grades by accident
home.parentDescription: Late balances, missed deadlines, and crowded office visits erode trust. See fees, grades, timetables, and assignments on your phone—pay via mobile money without the queue.
home.parentFeature1: Grades, attendance, and timetables before the parent meeting—not after
home.parentFeature2: Pay the exact balance via mobile money—no disputes at the gate
home.parentFeature3: Submit assignments and message teachers without visiting the office
